text: In the first space, I sense a peculiar clarity—a void both inviting and uncanny. The minimalism tempts reflection, yet the starkness edges into the uncanny, making me feel alert, self-aware, almost suspended in time’s waiting room. Moving into the second scene, surrounded by vibrant colors and ideas, my mind stirs with curiosity. The R+D wall, full of human ambition and inquiry, inspires a sense of possibility. Here, my thoughts stretch outward, eager to connect with new meanings. The contrast between emptiness and inventive display makes me ponder the bounds and freedoms of human creativity.
